---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for OpenCanvas
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

Describe the problem you are trying to solve. What is frustrating, missing, or broken about the current experience?

## Proposed Solution

Describe what you would like to happen. Be as specific as you can about the behavior, UI, or API surface.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds you have considered.

## Which area does this affect?

- [ ] Write (documents)
- [ ] Grid (spreadsheets)
- [ ] Deck (presentations)
- [ ] AI functions / function-sdk
- [ ] Core model / operations
- [ ] Native file formats
- [ ] Storage / interop
- [ ] UI components
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other (specify below)

## Would you be willing to contribute this?

- [ ] Yes, I would like to implement this
- [ ] I could contribute with guidance
- [ ] No, I am requesting this feature

## Additional Context

Add any mockups, screenshots, code examples, or references that help explain your request.
